title: Staff Vacancies
metaDescription: Explore current staff vacancies at Rosehill College and join our dedicated team of educators and support staff. Find out about the roles available, the qualifications required, and how to apply to become part of a school that values excellence, community, and growth.

sections.heading: Join our team at Rosehill College
sections.lede: Explore exciting career opportunities at Rosehill College, where we are committed to fostering a dynamic and supportive environment for both students and staff. Whether you are passionate about teaching, administration, or support roles, we invite you to be a part of our vibrant educational community and contribute to the success and growth of our students.

sections.heading: How to apply
sections.html:
The terms and conditions, including base salary, for teaching positions are set by the Secondary Teachers Collective Agreement. The base salary for trained and registered teachers will range from $61,329 to $103,086 (rates effective from 2 December 2024), depending on the applicant's qualifications and experience. An individual's actual base salary will be established by a salary assessment once a role is confirmed.

A Rosehill College Application Form must accompany your CV and cover letter:

  • Application Form — Teachers
  • Application Form — Relief Teachers
  • Application Form — Support Staff

sections.heading: Current vacancies
sections.html: Vacancies are advertised on this page as they arise. There are no vacancies listed at present — please check back regularly, or get in touch with the school office if you would like to know more about working at Rosehill College.

sections.heading: Take the next step in your professional journey
sections.text: Discover the current vacancies and take the next step in your professional journey with us. Questions about a role or an application? We would love to hear from you.
